content.query:
-- DROP EXTERNAL TABLE ZDI.Freight
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ZDI.Freight (
	[UniqueID] bigint,
	[Client Code] nvarchar(4000),
	[Carrier Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[SCAC Code] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice#] nvarchar(4000),
	[Actual Invoice Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[BOL Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Total Freight] nvarchar(4000),
	[Total Discount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Linehaul] nvarchar(4000),
	[Accessorial 1 Description] nvarchar(4000),
	[Accessorial 1 Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Accessorial 2 Description] nvarchar(4000),
	[Accessorial 2 Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Other Accessorials] nvarchar(4000),
	[Other Accessorials Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Miles Driven] nvarchar(4000),
	[Class] nvarchar(4000),
	[Weight] nvarchar(4000),
	[Service] nvarchar(4000),
	[Carrier Invoice Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Rerated Invoice Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Payable Invoice Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Currency] nvarchar(4000),
	[Ship date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Zip] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Zip] nvarchar(4000),
	[Delivery Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Total Pieces] nvarchar(4000),
	[Quote Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Reference #] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To Postal Code] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Postal Code] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Delta] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Comment] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Bol Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice Status] nvarchar(4000),
	[PO#] nvarchar(4000),
	[References] nvarchar(4000),
	[Audit Detail] nvarchar(4000),
	[Payment Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Payment Number Status] nvarchar(4000),
	[Paid Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Paid Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Check Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Received Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Closed Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Gl Code] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Weight] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Weight Delta] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice Aging Days ] nvarchar(4000),
	[Credit Term Days ] nvarchar(4000),
	[Buffer Days] nvarchar(4000),
	[Hold] nvarchar(4000),
	[Mode] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'ZeroDown/LTL_Shipment_Summary_Report*.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [tlclakefs_tlclake_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormatQuote]
	)
GO

-- DROP EXTERNAL TABLE ZDI.Container
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ZDI.Container (
	[Container Number(s)] nvarchar(4000),
	[Po Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Ship Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Carrier Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Payable Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Linehaul] nvarchar(4000),
	[Final Mile] nvarchar(4000),
	[Other] nvarchar(4000),
	[Payment Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Batch Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Status] nvarchar(4000),
	[Division] nvarchar(4000),
	[BOL Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[In Gate Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper ZIP] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Name] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'ZeroDown/Container_Invoice_Report__*.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [tlclakefs_tlclake_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormatQuote]
	)
GO

-- DROP EXTERNAL TABLE ZDI.Freight
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ZDI.Freight (
	[Sales Order] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Ship date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Carrier Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Payable Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Payment Number Status] nvarchar(4000),
	[Payment Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Batch Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Division] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipment ID] nvarchar(4000),
	[BOL Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[In Gate Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Po Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Container Number(s)] nvarchar(4000),
	[# of Containers] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Shipper Zip] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Consignee Zip] nvarchar(4000),
	[Reference3] nvarchar(4000),
	[Reference4] nvarchar(4000),
	[BOL & Invoice & Identifier #] nvarchar(4000),
	[SCAC Code] nvarchar(4000),
	[Total Freight] nvarchar(4000),
	[Total Discount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Linehaul] nvarchar(4000),
	[Accessorial 1 Description] nvarchar(4000),
	[Accessorial 1 Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Accessorial 2 Description] nvarchar(4000),
	[Accessorial 2 Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Other Accessorials] nvarchar(4000),
	[Other Accessorials Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Miles Driven] nvarchar(4000),
	[Class] nvarchar(4000),
	[Weight] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Weight] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Weight Delta] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Weight % Delta] nvarchar(4000),
	[Service] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Amount] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match Delta] nvarchar(4000),
	[Match % Delta ] nvarchar(4000),
	[Currency] nvarchar(4000),
	[Delivery Date] nvarchar(4000),
	[Total Pieces] nvarchar(4000),
	[Quote Number] nvarchar(4000),
	[Reference #] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Bill To Postal Code] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Address] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To City] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To State] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Country] nvarchar(4000),
	[Remit To Postal Code] nvarchar(4000),
	[Invoice Status] nvarchar(4000),
	[References] nvarchar(4000),
	[Audit Detail] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'ZeroDown/Legacy_Report_*.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [tlclakefs_tlclake_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormatQuote]
	)
GO
